name: ORARIALS-01 arimoclomol ALS phase 3 trial
summary: A multinational phase 3 randomized trial of arimoclomol in early amyotrophic lateral sclerosis.
population: Adults with early amyotrophic lateral sclerosis

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Chaperone and Heat-Shock Support because they can show whether the intervention changes function and safety in Adults with early amyotrophic lateral sclerosis. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
